SELECT count(*)::int

    SELECT p."ID_PRESUPUESTO", p."DESCUENTO", p."EXMIR_IVA", p."FECHA_PRESUPUESTO", p."FECHA_CREACION", p."ID_CLIENTE", p."ID_ESTADO", p."ID_FACTURA", p."TOTAL_PRESUPUESTO", c."ID_CLIENTE" AS "ID_CLIENTE0", c."CONTACTO", c."CUIT", c."DOMICILIO", c."ID_CONDICION_AFIP", c."LOCALIDAD", c."PROVINCIA", c."RAZON_SOCIAL", c."TELEFONO", c."TRANSPORTE", c."VALIDO", e."ID_ESTADO" AS "ID_ESTADO0", e."CODIGO", e."DESCRIPCION"
    FROM "PRESUPUESTO" AS p
    INNER JOIN "CLIENTE" AS c ON p."ID_CLIENTE" = c."ID_CLIENTE"
    INNER JOIN "ESTADO_PRESUPUESTO" AS e ON p."ID_ESTADO" = e."ID_ESTADO"
    WHERE p."ID_PRESUPUESTO" = @__id_0
    LIMIT 1
) AS t
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT a."ID_ARTICULO_PRESUPUESTO", a."CANTIDAD", a."PENDIENTE", a."CODIGO", a."DESCRIPCION", a."DESCUENTO", a."FECHA_CREACION", a."HAY_STOCK", a."ID_ARTICULO", a."ID_PRESUPUESTO", a."PRECIO_UNITARIO", a0."ID_ARTICULO" AS "ID_ARTICULO0", a0."CODIGO" AS "CODIGO0", a0."DESCRIPCION" AS "DESCRIPCION0", a0."HABILITADO", a0."ID_ARTICULO_PRECIO", a0."ID_ASOCIADO_RELLENO", a0."ID_COLOR", a0."ID_FABRICANTE", a0."ID_MEDIDA", a0."ID_SUBFAMILIA", a0."STOCK", c0."ID_COLOR" AS "ID_COLOR0", c0."CODIGO" AS "CODIGO1", c0."HEXA", c0."DESCRIPCION" AS "DESCRIPCION1", m."ID_MEDIDA" AS "ID_MEDIDA0", m."CODIGO" AS "CODIGO2", m."DESCRIPCION" AS "DESCRIPCION2", a1."ID_ARTICULO_PRECIO" AS "ID_ARTICULO_PRECIO0", a1."CODIGO" AS "CODIGO3", a1."DESCRIPCION" AS "DESCRIPCION3", a1."PRECIO1", a1."PRECIO2", a1."PRECIO3", a1."RELLENO", s."ID_SUBFAMILIA" AS "ID_SUBFAMILIA0", s."CODIGO" AS "CODIGO4", s."DESCRIPCION" AS "DESCRIPCION4"
    FROM "ARTICULO_PRESUPUESTO" AS a
    INNER JOIN "ARTICULO" AS a0 ON a."ID_ARTICULO" = a0."ID_ARTICULO"
    INNER JOIN "COLOR" AS c0 ON a0."ID_COLOR" = c0."ID_COLOR"
    INNER JOIN "MEDIDA" AS m ON a0."ID_MEDIDA" = m."ID_MEDIDA"
    LEFT JOIN "ARTICULO_PRECIO" AS a1 ON a0."ID_ARTICULO_PRECIO" = a1."ID_ARTICULO_PRECIO"
    LEFT JOIN "SUBFAMILIA" AS s ON a0."ID_SUBFAMILIA" = s."ID_SUBFAMILIA"
) AS t0 ON t."ID_PRESUPUESTO" = t0."ID_PRESUPUESTO"
ORDER BY t."ID_PRESUPUESTO", t."ID_CLIENTE0", t."ID_ESTADO0", t0."ID_ARTICULO_PRESUPUESTO", t0."ID_ARTICULO0", t0."ID_COLOR0", t0."ID_MEDIDA0", t0."ID_ARTICULO_PRECIO0"

    SELECT a."ID_ARTICULO_PRESUPUESTO", a."CANTIDAD", a."PENDIENTE", a."CODIGO", a."DESCRIPCION", a."DESCUENTO", a."FECHA_CREACION", a."HAY_STOCK", a."ID_ARTICULO", a."ID_PRESUPUESTO", a."PRECIO_UNITARIO", a0."ID_ARTICULO" AS "ID_ARTICULO0", a0."CODIGO" AS "CODIGO0", a0."DESCRIPCION" AS "DESCRIPCION0", a0."HABILITADO", a0."ID_ARTICULO_PRECIO", a0."ID_ASOCIADO_RELLENO", a0."ID_COLOR", a0."ID_FABRICANTE", a0."ID_MEDIDA", a0."ID_SUBFAMILIA", a0."STOCK", c0."ID_COLOR" AS "ID_COLOR0", c0."CODIGO" AS "CODIGO1", c0."HEXA", c0."DESCRIPCION" AS "DESCRIPCION1", m."ID_MEDIDA" AS "ID_MEDIDA0", m."CODIGO" AS "CODIGO2", m."DESCRIPCION" AS "DESCRIPCION2", a1."ID_ARTICULO_PRECIO" AS "ID_ARTICULO_PRECIO0", a1."CODIGO" AS "CODIGO3", a1."DESCRIPCION" AS "DESCRIPCION3", a1."PRECIO1", a1."PRECIO2", a1."PRECIO3", a1."RELLENO", s."ID_SUBFAMILIA" AS "ID_SUBFAMILIA0", s."CODIGO" AS "CODIGO4", s."DESCRIPCION" AS "DESCRIPCION4"
    FROM "ARTICULO_PRESUPUESTO" AS a
    INNER JOIN "ARTICULO" AS a0 ON a."ID_ARTICULO" = a0."ID_ARTICULO"
    INNER JOIN "COLOR" AS c0 ON a0."ID_COLOR" = c0."ID_COLOR"
    INNER JOIN "MEDIDA" AS m ON a0."ID_MEDIDA" = m."ID_MEDIDA"
    LEFT JOIN "ARTICULO_PRECIO" AS a1 ON a0."ID_ARTICULO_PRECIO" = a1."ID_ARTICULO_PRECIO"
    LEFT JOIN "SUBFAMILIA" AS s ON a0."ID_SUBFAMILIA" = s."ID_SUBFAMILIA"
) AS t0 ON t."ID_PRESUPUESTO" = t0."ID_PRESUPUESTO"
ORDER BY t."FECHA_PRESUPUESTO" DESC, t."ID_PRESUPUESTO", c."ID_CLIENTE", e."ID_ESTADO", t0."ID_ARTICULO_PRESUPUESTO", t0."ID_ARTICULO0", t0."ID_COLOR0", t0."ID_MEDIDA0", t0."ID_ARTICULO_PRECIO0"

    SELECT p."ID_PEDIDO_PRODUCCION", p."FECHA", p."ID_PRESUPUESTO", p."ID_ESTADO_PEDIDO_PROD", p."ID_FABRICANTE", f."ID_FABRICANTE" AS "ID_FABRICANTE0", f."DIRECCION", f."PROVINCIA", f."RAZON_SOCIAL", f."TELEFONO"
    FROM "PEDIDO_PRODUCCION" AS p
    INNER JOIN "FABRICANTE" AS f ON p."ID_FABRICANTE" = f."ID_FABRICANTE"
    WHERE f."ID_FABRICANTE" = @__idTaller_0 AND p."FECHA" >= @__desde_1 AND p."FECHA" <= @__hasta_2
    ORDER BY p."FECHA" DESC, p."ID_PEDIDO_PRODUCCION" DESC
    LIMIT @__p_4 OFFSET @__p_3
) AS t
INNER JOIN "ESTADO_PEDIDO_PRODUCCION" AS e ON t."ID_ESTADO_PEDIDO_PROD" = e."ID_ESTADO_PRODUCCION"
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT p0."ID_PRODUCCION_ARTICULO", p0."CANTIDAD", p0."CANT_PENDIENTE", p0."CODIGO", p0."DESCRIPCION", p0."ID_ARTICULO", p0."ID_PEDIDO_PRODUCCION", a."ID_ARTICULO" AS "ID_ARTICULO0", a."CODIGO" AS "CODIGO0", a."DESCRIPCION" AS "DESCRIPCION0", a."HABILITADO", a."ID_ARTICULO_PRECIO", a."ID_ASOCIADO_RELLENO", a."ID_COLOR", a."ID_FABRICANTE", a."ID_MEDIDA", a."ID_SUBFAMILIA", a."STOCK", c."ID_COLOR" AS "ID_COLOR0", c."CODIGO" AS "CODIGO1", c."HEXA", c."DESCRIPCION" AS "DESCRIPCION1", s."ID_SUBFAMILIA" AS "ID_SUBFAMILIA0", s."CODIGO" AS "CODIGO2", s."DESCRIPCION" AS "DESCRIPCION2", m."ID_MEDIDA" AS "ID_MEDIDA0", m."CODIGO" AS "CODIGO3", m."DESCRIPCION" AS "DESCRIPCION3", a0."ID_ARTICULO_PRECIO" AS "ID_ARTICULO_PRECIO0", a0."CODIGO" AS "CODIGO4", a0."DESCRIPCION" AS "DESCRIPCION4", a0."PRECIO1", a0."PRECIO2", a0."PRECIO3", a0."RELLENO"
    FROM "PRODUCCION_ARTICULO" AS p0
    INNER JOIN "ARTICULO" AS a ON p0."ID_ARTICULO" = a."ID_ARTICULO"
    INNER JOIN "COLOR" AS c ON a."ID_COLOR" = c."ID_COLOR"
    LEFT JOIN "SUBFAMILIA" AS s ON a."ID_SUBFAMILIA" = s."ID_SUBFAMILIA"
    INNER JOIN "MEDIDA" AS m ON a."ID_MEDIDA" = m."ID_MEDIDA"
    LEFT JOIN "ARTICULO_PRECIO" AS a0 ON a."ID_ARTICULO_PRECIO" = a0."ID_ARTICULO_PRECIO"
) AS t0 ON t."ID_PEDIDO_PRODUCCION" = t0."ID_PEDIDO_PRODUCCION"
ORDER BY t."FECHA" DESC, t."ID_PEDIDO_PRODUCCION" DESC, t."ID_FABRICANTE0", e."ID_ESTADO_PRODUCCION", t0."ID_PRODUCCION_ARTICULO", t0."ID_ARTICULO0", t0."ID_COLOR0", t0."ID_SUBFAMILIA0", t0."ID_MEDIDA0"

LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT a."ID_ARTICULO_PRESUPUESTO", a."CANTIDAD", a."PENDIENTE", a."CODIGO", a."DESCRIPCION", a."DESCUENTO", a."FECHA_CREACION", a."HAY_STOCK", a."ID_ARTICULO", a."ID_PRESUPUESTO", a."PRECIO_UNITARIO", a0."ID_ARTICULO" AS "ID_ARTICULO0", a0."CODIGO" AS "CODIGO0", a0."DESCRIPCION" AS "DESCRIPCION0", a0."HABILITADO", a0."ID_ARTICULO_PRECIO", a0."ID_ASOCIADO_RELLENO", a0."ID_COLOR", a0."ID_FABRICANTE", a0."ID_MEDIDA", a0."ID_SUBFAMILIA", a0."STOCK", c0."ID_COLOR" AS "ID_COLOR0", c0."CODIGO" AS "CODIGO1", c0."HEXA", c0."DESCRIPCION" AS "DESCRIPCION1", m."ID_MEDIDA" AS "ID_MEDIDA0", m."CODIGO" AS "CODIGO2", m."DESCRIPCION" AS "DESCRIPCION2", a1."ID_ARTICULO_PRECIO" AS "ID_ARTICULO_PRECIO0", a1."CODIGO" AS "CODIGO3", a1."DESCRIPCION" AS "DESCRIPCION3", a1."PRECIO1", a1."PRECIO2", a1."PRECIO3", a1."RELLENO", s."ID_SUBFAMILIA" AS "ID_SUBFAMILIA0", s."CODIGO" AS "CODIGO4", s."DESCRIPCION" AS "DESCRIPCION4"
    FROM "ARTICULO_PRESUPUESTO" AS a
    INNER JOIN "ARTICULO" AS a0 ON a."ID_ARTICULO" = a0."ID_ARTICULO"
    INNER JOIN "COLOR" AS c0 ON a0."ID_COLOR" = c0."ID_COLOR"
    INNER JOIN "MEDIDA" AS m ON a0."ID_MEDIDA" = m."ID_MEDIDA"
    LEFT JOIN "ARTICULO_PRECIO" AS a1 ON a0."ID_ARTICULO_PRECIO" = a1."ID_ARTICULO_PRECIO"
    LEFT JOIN "SUBFAMILIA" AS s ON a0."ID_SUBFAMILIA" = s."ID_SUBFAMILIA"
) AS t0 ON t."ID_PRESUPUESTO" = t0."ID_PRESUPUESTO"
ORDER BY t."FECHA_PRESUPUESTO" DESC, t."ID_PRESUPUESTO", c."ID_CLIENTE", e."ID_ESTADO", t0."ID_ARTICULO_PRESUPUESTO", t0."ID_ARTICULO0", t0."ID_COLOR0", t0."ID_MEDIDA0", t0."ID_ARTICULO_PRECIO0"
